'''Mineral Assets Partnership''' was a large [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation. Several hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Mineral Assets Partnership underwrote a mining colony on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Karra]] due to the report of large amounts of [[varmigio]] present on the world. Trace elements of varmigio were required for [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] cores. The reports were soon proven to be incorrect, and Mineral Assets Partnership withdrew their support for the colony which perished soon after.
